nasb.text: I, even I, have spoken; indeed I have called him, I have brought him, and He will make his ways successful.

esv.text: I, even I, have spoken and called him; I have brought him, and he will prosper in his way.

cnv.text: 我親自說過，又呼召了他； 我帶領了他來，他所行的就必亨通。

ccb.text: 唯有我说过这些事； 我召了他，领他出来； 他必一路亨通。

csbs.text: 我亲自说了， 我也召唤了他； 我把他带来， 他必在自己的道路上兴盛。
